purpose_statement: Installs git hooks by setting core.hooksPath to .githooks/

Variant pre-commit hook that blocks file deletions (safety net for content preservation)
Pre-push hook — blocks push if AI stash files present, codex locks stale, or task contract invalid
Manages Mintlify dev server lifecycle for browser tests (start/stop/health-check)
Verifies browser availability for Puppeteer-based integration tests
Pre-commit sub-hook — verifies file-walker is available and runs structural checks on staged files
Fetches latest topics and posts from Livepeer Forum API, writes to snippets/automations/forum/
Fetches blog posts from Ghost CMS API, writes to snippets/automations/blog/
Fetches video data from YouTube Data API, writes to snippets/automations/youtube/

Audits deployed docs page HTTP status codes (v1, v2, or both) and emits a stable JSON report
Smoke-tests sentinel MDX routes for runtime component failures, focused on page-killing render errors from MDX-imported JSX modules.
Comprehensive OpenAPI spec validation — checks references, schemas, examples. Supports --strict (validate), --fix (repair), and report modes.
Comprehensive V2 MDX link audit — checks internal links, external links, anchor refs. Supports --staged, --full, --strict, --write-links modes.
Self-test suite for v2-link-audit.js — validates audit logic against known fixtures
WCAG accessibility audit for v2 pages — checks heading hierarchy, alt text, ARIA. Supports --fix mode for auto-repair.
Self-test suite for v2-wcag-audit.js — validates WCAG audit logic against known fixtures
Test orchestrator — dispatches all unit test suites. Called by pre-commit hook and npm test.
PR orchestrator — runs changed-file scoped validation checks for pull request CI. Dispatches per-file validators based on PR diff.

Tests codex-safe-merge-with-stash.js — validates safe merge logic with stash handling
Tests sync-codex-skills.js — validates skill file synchronisation between sources
Verifies component governance generators produce coherent registry, usage-map, and docs outputs.
Verifies shared component governance utility parsing, scanning, and archive exclusion behavior.
Template for category-scoped component unit tests.

Validates docs-guide source-of-truth coverage, README pointers, and generated index freshness
Validates docs.json page-entry syntax, reports missing routes, suggests remaps, and optionally applies approved remaps
Validates MDX internal links and snippet import paths are resolvable
Tests lpd scoped mint-dev functionality — validates dev server scope filtering
Unit tests for the MDX runtime smoke helpers — covers arg parsing, sentinel route selection, trigger logic, and failure classification.
Unit tests for the MDX-facing component scope validator — covers unsafe private helpers, safe inline logic, and imported helper patterns.
Enforces MDX guardrails — globals imports, math delimiters, markdown table line breaks

Validates MDX syntax and structure — checks for parse errors, invalid JSX, broken components

Tests OpenAPI rolling issue tracker — validates issue creation and dedup logic
Content quality checks — validates frontmatter completeness, thin content detection, placeholder flagging
Unit tests for repair-spelling.js — validates deterministic spelling fixes and exclusion ranges
Tests audit-script-inventory repair hardening rules for judgement-field backfill and pipeline safety.

Tests codex/task-preflight.js — verifies managed worktree default behavior and the explicit in-place override
Tests repair-governance.js for safe dry-run, fix, rollback, strict exit handling, and workflow contract coverage.

Auto-repairs derived JSDoc metadata fields from repo state. Safe fields only. Mirrors AUDIT-00 --fix pattern for components.
